subcodes.first_line: O Thou kind Lord! Sanctify my heart from all attachment, and gladden my soul with tidings of joy
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خداوند مهربان این دل را از هر تعلقی فارغ نما و این جان را بهر بشارتی
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for detachment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
full_text_parts: O Thou kind Lord!  Sanctify my heart from all attachment, and gladden my soul with tidings of joy.  Free me from attachment to friend and stranger alike, and captivate me with Thy love, that I may become wholly devoted to Thee and be filled with fervid rapture; that I may desire naught but Thee, seek no one except Thyself, tread no other path besides Thine, and commune only with Thee; that I may, even as a nightingale, be spellbound by Thy love and, by day and night, sigh and wail and weep and cry out, “Yá Bahá’u’l-Abhá!”
